archetype: Electric & Neon meets Obsidian Glass (Archetype 7 + Archetype 4 Fusion)

rules: Use mono font for Terminal, Calculator, and Task Manager stats.
Headings should have tight letter spacing.

borders.style: 1px solid crisp borders. Avoid muddy drop shadows; use tight, high-contrast borders.

textures.desktop: Grainy noise overlay mixed with a dark abstract base image. CSS grid background patterns (1px lines every 100px) can add a 'Mine/Technical' feel.

desktop.container: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden relative text-white bg-black
desktop.icon_grid: absolute inset-0 p-4 grid grid-cols-[repeat(auto-fill,minmax(80px,1fr))] grid-rows-[repeat(auto-fill,minmax(100px,1fr))] gap-2 items-start justify-items-center z-0 pointer-events-none

taskbar.container: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-12 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-2 gap-2
taskbar.start_button: h-8 w-8 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/10 rounded-md transition-colors
taskbar.app_list: flex-1 flex items-center gap-1 overflow-x-hidden px-2
taskbar.system_tray: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 h-full text-xs font-mono

start_menu.container: absolute bottom-14 left-2 w-96 h-[500px] z-50 flex flex-col p-4 gap-4

window.base: absolute top-20 left-20 flex flex-col overflow-hidden
window.titlebar: h-10 w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 border-b border-white/10 bg-black/40 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing

apps.task_manager: Dense 'Bento' grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. High data density, tabular layout.
apps.file_manager: Sidebar (w-48) for quick access + Main grid for files.
apps.terminal: Pure black background (#000000), font-mono, #00F0FF or #00FF00 text. No glassmorphism inside the text area.
apps.settings: Two-column layout. Sidebar for categories, main panel for toggles/inputs.

windows.drag: scale 0.99 during drag for tactile feel

buttons.hover: bg transition duration-150, subtle transform scale-105 for critical buttons

components_instructions.draggable_windows: Use framer-motion's <motion.div drag dragControls />. Must handle z-index ordering so the clicked window comes to the front.
components_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. For desktop icons, use size 32 or 40. For taskbar, use size 20.
components_instructions.context_menu: Build a custom absolute positioned div mapped to right-click coordinates. Prevent default browser context menu on the desktop surface.
components_instructions.shadcn: You may use shadcn components for internal app forms (Settings, Calculator buttons) but strip their default borders/backgrounds to match the 'Obsidian Glass' theme. Prioritize custom raw HTML/Tailwind for the Window Manager itself.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against glassmorphism meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow if necessary over images.
accessibility.focus: Use focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-primary for all interactive elements.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap heavy animations in a check for prefers-reduced-motion.

image_urls.description: Dark obsidian textured abstract art. Use as the absolute background with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/50) so icons are perfectly legible.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN. ALWAYS use provided images.
Components MUST use named exports (`export const ComponentName = ...`) and Pages MUST use default exports.
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing (e.g., `data-testid="start-menu-button"`).
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
